title: limnorchis yosemitensis
intro: Limnorchis yosemitensis, also known as the Sierra bog orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its potential use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Limnorchis yosemitensis may include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve breathing capacity. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its roots and leaves, which can be used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to support respiratory health.
